ACTION SETTLES AND STIPULATED SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD. DEFENDANT TO PAY PLTF $2000. TO PLTF'S COUNSEL ON OR BEFORE 90 DAYS FROM THIS DATE. UPON RECEIPT, DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE SHALL BE FILED. EACH PARTY TO PAY THEIR OWN COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES. IF PAYMENT IS NOT TIMELY, PLTF SHALL BE ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT FOR $4140. PLUS COSTS AND NO ADDITIONAL CLAIMS FOR RELIEF.
